title: portulaca meyeri
intro: Portulaca meyeri, also known as the Moss Rose or Moss Portulaca, is a species of flowering plant in the purslane family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Portulaca meyeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and support the immune system, while its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications. By harnessing its medicinal properties, Portulaca meyeri has been used to treat a range of ailments, from respiratory issues to wounds and skin irritations.
